meta.title: WillChain – Your Digital Will on the Blockchain
meta.description: WillChain is an automated digital will on the blockchain. Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir without lawyers or notaries.
meta.og_title: WillChain – Your Digital Will on the Blockchain
meta.og_description: Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir. No lawyers. No bureaucracy. Forever on the blockchain.

hero.badge: Your Digital Will on the Blockchain
hero.title: When You're Gone – Your Assets Go to Your Nominee
hero.subtitle: Every year, thousands of people die without designating a successor for their cryptocurrency. Their loved ones know the funds exist but can't access them. WillChain solves this automatically.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: What Happens to Your Crypto When You Pass Away?
problem.subtitle: Most people don't think about it until it's too late.
problem.card1_desc: If you're the only one with the private key, your funds disappear forever when you're gone. No court or notary can help.
problem.card2_desc: Billions of dollars in cryptocurrency sit untouched in abandoned wallets. Their owners are gone, and the funds are locked forever – nobody can access them.
problem.card3_desc: Even if they know the funds exist, without the key or password, family members can't access them. It's a legal dead end.

recycle.label: Recycle Funds
recycle.hint: If a wallet owner has completely disappeared (no activity beyond the set period + 60 days) and hasn't designated an heir, anyone can initiate the recycling of funds and receive a 1% reward.
recycle.status_inactive: Inactive – Not Yet Abandoned (Total timeout not expired)

how_it_works.label: 4 Steps
how_it_works.subtitle: Four simple steps – and your crypto is protected
how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Buy WILL tokens on an exchange or receive them from another owner. Your digital will is activated as soon as you hold any amount of WILL.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Specify the wallet address of the person who should receive your funds after your prolonged inactivity or death. This can be a spouse, child, friend – anyone you care about.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Any outgoing transaction automatically confirms your activity. If your wallet has been unused for a while, simply click 'I'm Here!' manually.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Set how long without activity triggers the WillChain mechanism: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. Then, a 30-day grace period and 30 days for the heir follow.

credits.label: Trust
credits.title: Why Trust WillChain?
credits.subtitle: Transparency, security, and reliability – not just words, but proven facts.
credits.opensource_desc: All code is published on GitHub. Anyone can verify that the contract does exactly what it promises.
credits.audit_desc: The contract underwent a 4-category audit: Protocol, Security, UX, and Operations. All identified issues have been fixed.
credits.tests_desc: Hardhat, Foundry fuzz, bot, frontend – every change is automatically tested before deployment.
credits.network_desc: Built on Base – a network by Coinbase. Transactions cost less than $0.01 and confirm in seconds.

trust.noncustodial_desc: No one but your heir can access your funds

faq.label: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need to log in daily?
faq.a1: No. If you regularly use your crypto wallet, the timer resets automatically. The 'I'm Here!' button is only needed if your wallet is completely unused.
faq.q2: What time periods can I choose?
faq.a2: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. You can change this at any time. Those who trade frequently choose 30 days, while long-term investors choose 365.
faq.q3: What happens if the period expires?
faq.a3: A 30-day grace period begins – you can still confirm your presence. Then, the heir has 30 days to initiate a claim. If no heir is designated or they don't claim in time, funds are recycled: 47% are burned forever, 47% are distributed to WILL holders, 5% goes to the protocol, and 1% to the initiator.
faq.q4: Can someone change my heir without my knowledge?
faq.a4: No. Only you, with your private key, can change the heir. The contract guarantees this.
faq.q5: Does anyone see my personal data?
faq.a5: No. The blockchain only stores your wallet address, balance, and activity timestamps. No names or personal information.
faq.q6: Where is the smart contract located?
faq.a6: Deployed on the Base Sepolia testnet. The source code is open and verified on Basescan.
faq.q7: Does auto-resetting the timer work with multi-sig wallets?
faq.a7: If you use a standard wallet (MetaMask, Trust Wallet), the timer resets with any transfer. However, if you use Smart Wallets or Multisig (like Safe), where a relayer executes the transaction, you'll need to manually confirm your activity via the button on the site.
faq.q8: Can DEX or dApp approvals affect my inheritance?
faq.a8: No. Token approvals (allowances) do not affect your inheritance timer. Only your direct actions – transfers, confirmActivity, or vault configuration – count as presence confirmation. A third party using transferFrom() cannot reset your timer. Your inheritance will still work even with active DEX allowances.

security.allowance_text: Only your direct actions count as confirmation of presence: token transfers, activity confirmations, or vault configurations. DEX swaps via allowances do not reset the timer. If you trade on DEXs, remember to confirm your activity separately.

disclaimer.title: Legal Information
disclaimer.modal_subtitle: Please read before connecting your wallet
disclaimer.s1_text: The WILL token is a utility token solely for managing digital inheritance within WillChain. Holding the token does not grant rights to profits, equity, or any rights associated with securities.
disclaimer.s2_text: The token burning mechanism is a technical tool to clear the network of inactive participants, not a promise of market value growth. We do not guarantee liquidity or future asset prices.
disclaimer.s3_text: The user is fully responsible for maintaining activity or performing manual confirmations before the set deadline expires. Loss of access to private keys or missing the deadline will result in irreversible loss of access to funds.
disclaimer.s4_text: The protocol is deployed on Base (Ethereum L2). You agree to the risks associated with smart contract vulnerabilities or blockchain network updates. This is experimental software – use at your own risk.
disclaimer.s5_text: Users are obliged to verify independently whether using WillChain complies with the legislation of their jurisdiction.
disclaimer.checkbox: I have read and accept the terms. I understand that I am fully responsible for my activity and potential loss of assets.
